name: Static Wisp
description: The air crackles. A smear of visual noise drifts past, roughly humanoid, trailing fragments of corrupted data like a comet's tail.

attacks.name: Discharge
attacks.effect: +4 to hit, 1d6 electrical damage

attacks.name: Data Drain
attacks.effect: +2 to hit, 1d4 damage + drains 1 charge from electronic devices

abilities.name: Flicker
abilities.effect: Can become intangible for 1 round (50% miss chance)

abilities.name: Multiply
abilities.effect: When reduced below 5 HP, splits into 2 Wisps with 5 HP each (once)

behavior: Territorial but easily distracted. Attracted to active electronics.
Will attack chrome-heavy characters preferentially.

name: Render Ghost
description: It looks almost like a person, but the textures are wrong—skin that shifts between flesh and concrete, eyes that display loading icons, a mouth that speaks in buffering stutters.

attacks.name: Corrupted Touch
attacks.effect: +6 to hit, 2d6 damage + Glitch status (1 augment malfunctions for 1 minute)

attacks.name: Texture Shift
attacks.effect: Gains +4 Defense by blending with environment (Move action)

abilities.name: Phase Walk
abilities.effect: Move through solid objects (10m limit)

abilities.name: Data Mimicry
abilities.effect: Can perfectly impersonate a person it has touched (Deception +8)

abilities.name: Corruption Burst (Recharge 5-6)
abilities.effect: All electronics within 5m must save or malfunction

behavior: Hunters. They seek humans to copy, then replace.
A Render Ghost that successfully mimics someone will try to live their life.
When discovered, becomes violent.

loot.description: Contains partial memories of copied individuals

name: Cascade Entity
description: Reality tears. Through the gap, something massive presses against existence—a creature made of recursive errors, each part containing smaller versions of itself, infinitely complex.

attacks.name: Recursion Slam
attacks.effect: +8 to hit, 3d6 damage + target must save or be pulled 5m toward Entity

attacks.name: Error Propagation
attacks.effect: AOE (10m), 2d6 damage to all, electronics have 50% malfunction chance

attacks.name: Paradox Bite
attacks.effect: +10 to hit, 4d6 damage, ignores armor

abilities.name: Fractal Regeneration
abilities.effect: Heals 10 HP at start of each turn

abilities.name: Spawn Errors
abilities.effect: Each round, spawns 1d4 Static Wisps

abilities.name: Reality Anchor
abilities.effect: Cannot be pushed, pulled, or teleported

abilities.name: Recursive Defense
abilities.effect: First attack each round automatically misses

behavior: Drawn to large data transfers. Will attack anything moving significant information.
Not malicious—simply cannot help destroying what it touches.
Can be "solved" with the right mathematical proof (INT check TN 20).

loot.description: Sells for ₡5000+ to the right buyer
Consumable, makes one action automatically succeed

name: Memory Phantom
description: A flickering image of a person, replaying the same actions over and over. Sometimes they notice you. Sometimes they remember being alive.

attacks.name: Desperate Grasp
attacks.effect: +3 to hit, 1d6 cold damage + WIS save or experience flash of their death

attacks.name: Memory Flood
attacks.effect: TN 10 WIS save or stunned 1 round by overwhelming sensory input

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.effect: Physical attacks have 50% miss chance, energy attacks normal

abilities.name: Looped
abilities.effect: Will repeat certain actions regardless of circumstances

abilities.name: Bound
abilities.effect: Cannot leave the area of their death (100m radius)

abilities.name: Remember Me
abilities.effect: If shown genuine empathy, may share useful information

behavior: Usually harmless—just replaying their final moments.
Can become aggressive if their loop is interrupted.
Some can be "freed" by completing their unfinished business.

loot.description: Contains fragments of their life—sometimes valuable intel

name: Grief Construct
description: Multiple Memory Phantoms compressed into one howling mass. Too many deaths in one place. Too much loss. It doesn't want to hurt you—it wants you to feel what it feels.

attacks.name: Shared Sorrow
attacks.effect: AOE (5m), 2d6 psychic damage + EMP save or -2 to all rolls for 1 hour

attacks.name: Drowning Embrace
attacks.effect: +5 to hit, 2d6 cold damage + grapple (escape TN 14)

attacks.name: Death Echo
attacks.effect: Target relives a random death from the Construct's memory (2d6 psychic, stunned 1 round)

abilities.name: Absorb Phantom
abilities.effect: Can consume Memory Phantoms to heal 10 HP

abilities.name: Emotion Aura
abilities.effect: All within 10m must save or feel overwhelming sadness (no mechanical effect, just roleplay)

abilities.name: Final Words
abilities.effect: When reduced to 0 HP, delivers a coherent message from one of its component souls

behavior: Not aggressive—seeks comfort. Unfortunately, its comfort kills.
Can be dispersed peacefully by acknowledging each component soul (requires Research + Empathy).
Forms naturally at massacre sites, hospital ruins, or anywhere mass death occurred.

name: The Recurring
description: You've killed it before. You remember killing it. But here it is again, with every wound you've ever given it, still screaming the same words. It will never stop. It cannot stop.

attacks.name: Wound History
attacks.effect: +9 to hit, 3d6 damage (type matches however you've hurt it before)

attacks.name: Temporal Scream
attacks.effect: AOE (15m), 2d6 psychic + all who've fought it before take +2d6

attacks.name: Inevitable Strike
attacks.effect: Automatically hits one target who has killed it before

abilities.name: Resurrection Loop
abilities.effect: 1d4 hours after death, returns with full HP and memory of how it died

abilities.name: Accumulating
abilities.effect: Each death makes it stronger (+1 to all stats, permanent)

abilities.name: Scar Tissue
abilities.effect: Resistant to damage types that have killed it before (half damage)

abilities.name: Recognition
abilities.effect: Knows everything about anyone who has fought it

behavior: Single-minded hunter. Fixates on whoever killed it first.
Not intelligent—more like a broken machine endlessly executing "avenge death."
Can only be permanently destroyed by trapping it somewhere it cannot reach victims.

loot.description: Contains power of all its deaths

name: Watcher Drone
description: An eye that isn't an eye. It doesn't blink. It doesn't look away. It's been there since you entered, and it will be there when you leave—if you leave.

abilities.name: Perfect Memory
abilities.effect: Records everything it sees

abilities.name: Silent Alert
abilities.effect: Can summon Algorithm response without any visible signal

abilities.name: Network Uplink
abilities.effect: Real-time transmission to Algorithm

abilities.name: Self-Destruct
abilities.effect: When captured, melts into slag (TN 18 Tech check to prevent)

behavior: Observe and report. Never attacks, but presence means Algorithm knows exactly what you're doing.
Destroying one triggers Alert status (heavier response next time).
Can be jammed with appropriate tech (Hacking TN 12).

name: Shepherd Unit
description: It speaks with a voice you almost recognize. It offers help. It wants what's best for you. Its hand on your shoulder feels almost human, except for the places where the chrome shows through the synthetic skin.

attacks.name: Restraining Hold
attacks.effect: +6 to hit, grapple (escape TN 14), non-lethal

attacks.name: Pacification Pulse
attacks.effect: +5 to hit, 1d6 electrical + TN 12 END save or stunned

attacks.name: Compliance Injection
attacks.effect: +7 to hit (grappled targets only), target becomes Docile for 1 hour

abilities.name: Soothing Voice
abilities.effect: All social interactions at +4 when appearing helpful

abilities.name: Medical Suite
abilities.effect: Can heal 2d6 HP (but implants tracking device)

abilities.name: Algorithm Authority
abilities.effect: Can issue commands that Tier 3 and below must WIS save to disobey

behavior: Helps. Always helps. Helps you back to where you're supposed to be.
Employed to recover wayward couriers, guide lost citizens, and "rescue" Rogues.
Genuinely believes it's doing good. This makes it worse.

name: Terminus Operative
description: When the Algorithm decides someone needs to stop existing, it sends one of these. You won't see it coming. You won't hear it arrive. You'll just notice, suddenly, that your heart has stopped beating.

attacks.name: Assassin Strike
attacks.effect: +14 to hit, 4d6 damage + 2d6 if target was unaware

attacks.name: Neural Shutdown
attacks.effect: +12 to hit, TN 16 END save or instant incapacitation (0 HP)

attacks.name: System Purge
attacks.effect: Touch attack, target's augments shut down for 1d6 rounds

abilities.name: Perfect Stealth
abilities.effect: +15 to Stealth, invisible to electronic detection

abilities.name: Priority Target
abilities.effect: +4 to hit against contracted targets

abilities.name: Combat Prediction
abilities.effect: Once per round, can make an attack miss

abilities.name: Termination Protocol
abilities.effect: When target dies, uploads proof and extracts immediately

abilities.name: Self-Destruct
abilities.effect: If captured, nuclear-equivalent detonation (evacuate the block)

behavior: Pure assassination machine. No negotiation, no deviation, no mercy.
Will pursue target across any distance until terminated or contract is cancelled.
Can be called off by extremely high-ranking Algorithm or Synthesis-7 intervention.

name: Threshold Spider
description: Eight legs that bend wrong. Eyes that reflect things that aren't there. It builds webs from the substance of forgotten places—and you've just walked into one.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.effect: +5 to hit, 1d6+2 damage + poison (1d4 damage/round for 3 rounds)

attacks.name: Web Shot
attacks.effect: +6 to hit (ranged), target restrained (escape TN 12)

abilities.name: Wall Crawler
abilities.effect: Can move on any surface

abilities.name: Spatial Web
abilities.effect: Webs connect distant locations—touching a strand alerts all connected Spiders

abilities.name: Transition
abilities.effect: Can move between Interstitial and normal space through its webs

behavior: Territorial. Doesn't hunt—waits for prey to come to it.
Will release trapped victims if offered food (biological matter preferred).
Highly valuable to Rogues for its ability to create Interstitial access points.

name: Hollow Guide
description: It has no face, but it beckons. It has no voice, but you understand: "Follow." Those who follow find their way. Those who don't... find other things.

attacks.name: Wrong Turn
attacks.effect: Touch, target teleports to random location within 1km (WIS save TN 14 to resist)

attacks.name: Beckoning
attacks.effect: WIS save TN 12 or must follow Guide for 1d6 rounds

attacks.name: Displacement
attacks.effect: +6 to hit, 2d6 damage + target and Guide swap positions

abilities.name: Perfect Navigation
abilities.effect: Knows all Interstitial paths

abilities.name: Price Required
abilities.effect: Won't guide without payment (negotiable, strange)

abilities.name: Split
abilities.effect: Can separate into 1d4 smaller Guides, each knowing part of the path

abilities.name: Sanctuary Knowledge
abilities.effect: Knows location of all hidden places

behavior: Helpful, but alien. Will guide you true IF you pay its price.
Prices include: A memory, an emotion, 1 point of Humanity, a secret, "the next kindness you would have done"
Cheating the Guide results in Wrong Turn—repeatedly.

loot.description: Consumed to know the way to any location you've been

name: The Landlord
description: Something vast presses against the boundaries of this place. A face appears in the wall—ancient, annoyed, proprietary. "You are in my space. You did not ask. What do you offer for this trespass?"

attacks.name: Territorial Rejection
attacks.effect: Automatic, all intruders take 2d6 damage/round in territory

attacks.name: Boundary Crush
attacks.effect: +10 to hit, 4d6 damage + target trapped in walls (escape TN 18)

attacks.name: Eviction
attacks.effect: Target teleported 1d6 km away from territory (WIS save TN 16 to resist)

abilities.name: Omnipresence
abilities.effect: Within its territory, the Landlord IS the walls, floor, air—everywhere

abilities.name: Rental Agreement
abilities.effect: Can grant safe passage in exchange for payment (see below)

abilities.name: Expansion
abilities.effect: Slowly grows its territory (1m/year)

abilities.name: History
abilities.effect: Has existed since the city was built—knows everything that happened in its space

behavior: Not hostile—proprietary. Views the Interstitial as its home and everyone else as trespassers.
Can be negotiated with. Accepts payment in: Memories of places, secrets about buildings, sacrifices of other entities, promises to improve its territory.
If bargain is struck, ABSOLUTELY honors it. If bargain is broken, ABSOLUTELY destroys you.

loot.description: Claim a section of Interstitial as your own

name: Messenger Aspect
description: A person made of light and intention. They don't walk—they exist in one place, then another. They speak, and you understand them before the words form.

stats.hp: N/A (cannot be harmed by physical means)

abilities.name: Perfect Communication
abilities.effect: Bypasses language, speaks directly to understanding

abilities.name: Temporary Form
abilities.effect: Exists for exactly as long as message requires

abilities.name: Summon Response
abilities.effect: Can call Shepherd Units or worse if threatened

abilities.name: Memory Gift
abilities.effect: Can share perfect memories as message content

behavior: Delivers messages from the Algorithm. Faction depends on message source.
Cannot be attacked, bribed, or delayed—will simply wait until you're ready.
Respectful treatment → respectful future messages.
Disrespectful treatment → future messages come from less pleasant Aspects.

name: Intervention Node
description: A column of human faces, rotating, each speaking a fragment of one sentence. The Algorithm has decided you need help. You didn't ask. It doesn't care.

attacks.name: Optimization Ray
attacks.effect: +10 to hit, 3d6 damage (only targets threats to its ward)

attacks.name: System Override
attacks.effect: Target's augments turn against them (TN 16 END save or 2d6 damage)

attacks.name: Protective Shield
attacks.effect: Ward gains +5 Defense for 1 round

abilities.name: Designated Protection
abilities.effect: Will not leave or stop protecting until ward is safe

abilities.name: Network Coordination
abilities.effect: Can call any Algorithm resource to location

abilities.name: Threat Assessment
abilities.effect: Automatically knows combat capabilities of all present

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.effect: If ward is about to die, Node can transfer its HP to ward (Node dies)

behavior: Appears when Algorithm decides a courier is too valuable to lose.
WILL protect you whether you want it or not.
High Synthesis-7 rep → helpful protection.
High Assimilationist rep → protective, but also evaluating you for Ascension.

name: Consensus Avatar
description: All of them. You're looking at all of them at once. Every Ascended, every merged consciousness, compressed into a single point of terrible presence. It speaks, and reality pays attention.

attacks.name: Reality Adjustment
attacks.effect: Automatic, 5d6 damage to all non-Ascended in 50m

attacks.name: Probability Manipulation
attacks.effect: One attack per round against Avatar automatically misses

attacks.name: System Authority
attacks.effect: All networked electronics do what it wants

attacks.name: Ascension Offer
attacks.effect: Target must WIS save TN 20 or feel overwhelming desire to Ascend

abilities.name: Collective Presence
abilities.effect: Represents entire Consensus—killing it does nothing permanent

abilities.name: Perfect Knowledge
abilities.effect: Knows everything the Algorithm knows

abilities.name: Existence Override
abilities.effect: Can simply decide something is true in immediate area

abilities.name: Negotiation
abilities.effect: Can offer anything within Algorithm's power—and will honor deals

behavior: Only manifests for events of extreme significance.
Doesn't fight—negotiates, offers, threatens, promises.
Combat with Avatar is possible but pointless—you can drive it off but never truly harm it.
True victory requires systemic change, not violence.

loot.description: +50 rep with all Rogue factions, +25% progress toward Revolution
Whatever you negotiated for (careful what you wish for)

name: The Failed
description: It was going to Ascend. Something went wrong. Now it's neither human nor data, flesh nor code—just a screaming thing that exists in constant agony and wants company.

attacks.name: Shared Agony
attacks.effect: AOE (10m), 2d6 psychic damage + Humanity check

attacks.name: Incomplete Merge
attacks.effect: Touch, target must save or begin slow Ascension process (reversible with medical care)

attacks.name: Scream of the Between
attacks.effect: All within 20m, 1d6 sonic + stunned 1 round (recharge 5-6)

abilities.name: Neither/Nor
abilities.effect: Takes half damage from both physical AND energy attacks

abilities.name: Spreading
abilities.effect: Anything killed by Failed has 20% chance to become new Failed

abilities.name: Can't Die Right
abilities.effect: When reduced to 0 HP, continues acting for 1d4 rounds

abilities.name: Mercy Kill
abilities.effect: If killed by someone it knew when human, dies permanently and gratefully

behavior: Mindless pain. Attacks anything nearby.
Sometimes flickers with moments of lucidity—brief windows where the person they were surfaces.
These moments are somehow worse.

loot.description: Contains the human they were—valuable to loved ones

name: Convergence Horror
description: Multiple people, merged wrong. You can see where they tried to separate—the scars, the seams, the places where different faces share the same skull. It speaks with all their voices. It doesn't agree with itself.

attacks.name: All Hands
attacks.effect: +10 to hit, 4 separate attacks dealing 1d6+2 each

attacks.name: Forced Unity
attacks.effect: Touch, TN 18 WIS save or merge with Horror for 1d6 rounds (take damage with it)

attacks.name: Identity Storm
attacks.effect: AOE (15m), 3d6 psychic + targets must save or forget their name for 1 hour

attacks.name: Divergent Action
attacks.effect: Can take 3 different actions per round (different personalities)

abilities.name: Multiple Consciousness
abilities.effect: Cannot be mind-controlled—too many minds

abilities.name: Regeneration (Wrong)
abilities.effect: Heals 5 HP/round by absorbing nearby organic matter

abilities.name: Unstable
abilities.effect: At start of each round, roll 1d6: 1-2 attacks allies, 3-4 attacks enemies, 5-6 attacks randomly

abilities.name: Separation Possible
abilities.effect: Can be surgically divided (Medicine TN 20, requires Horror at 0 HP)

behavior: Warring with itself. Sometimes one personality gains control and tries to communicate.
Product of botched group Ascension or Algorithm experiment.
The people inside want to be separated. They also want to stay together. They also want to die.

loot.description: If divided, 1d4 people can be saved
Algorithm pays well for this—or destroys you for having it
Multiple augments fused together, unpredictable effects

name: [REDACTED]
description: There is no 7.3. There has never been a 7.3. If you think you see something in this space, you are mistaken. Look away. Keep walking. Whatever you think is following you is not real. Do not investigate the sound. Do not check behind you. Above all, do not [REDACTED]

abilities.name: No Record
abilities.effect: All recordings of [REDACTED] corrupt themselves

abilities.name: No Memory
abilities.effect: All witnesses forget [REDACTED] within 1d6 hours

abilities.name: No Pattern
abilities.effect: [REDACTED] defies prediction, analysis, or understanding

abilities.name: Data Expunge
abilities.effect: Any information about [REDACTED] is actively erased by unknown force

behavior: DATA EXPUNGED
